description: You are a biostatistics researcher analyzing data from a study on the effect of vitamin C on tooth growth in guinea pigs (Crampton, 1947). Using the ToothGrowth.csv dataset (variables: 'len', 'supp', 'dose'), perform a factorial ANOVA to determine if supplement type and dose interact in their effect on tooth length. The analysis must include homogeneity and normality assumption checks, post-hoc comparisons, and a descriptives table. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowthAnalysis.omv.
